title: 100% Organic
description: Sourced from India's first fully organic state, completely free of chemical pesticides and fertilizers.

title: Traceability
description: Track the journey of your produce directly to the specific farm and farmer in Sikkim.

title: Fair Trade
description: Empowering local farmers by eliminating middlemen and ensuring fair compensation.

title: Quality Assured
description: Strict quality control measures and certifications to ensure premium standard.
